response.global_analysis: The video contains a medley of two songs: 'Shinu no ga Iwa' (cover) and 'Cute na Kanojo'. The Reference JSON correctly identifies 'Cute na Kanojo' and provides its lyrics, which phonetically match the second half of the video. However, the JSON misidentifies the first song as 'Koishiteru ZOMBIE' (which appears to be the unit or set title) and provides no lyrics for the actual song being performed ('Shinu no ga Iwa'). I am transcribing the first song from audio/on-screen text and using the JSON as a guide for the second, while correcting semantic errors in the provided English reference.
